change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: Provide support to produce virus free saplings using tissue culture techniqueSupport to the quality saplings nursery establishmentIntroduction of GAP in the production clustersEstablishment of Model Cardamom demonstration Farm for piloting SPS measuresOrganization of trainings to Government technical officers and technicians and exposure visitsSupport to draft a national policy and guidelines on L. cardamomStudy on existing processing plants (within and outside country), and product and market diversificationDesign, fabrication, and testing of New double drum cost-effective dryer and commercialized at scaleOrganize post-harvest and marketing trainings to the concern value chain actorsDevelopment of SOP for drying, storage and transportation, and GMP guidelinesSupport to promote storage and warehouse facilitySupport Cardamom Producer Association to establish E market platformRegistration of HS code of large cardamom 09083010 with 10 digits specification with ITC/WTO and the branding logo.Support to explore new marketsDevelop IEC materials (printed materials, newspaper articles, and audio/video) success stories to launch the mass media campaign for creating awareness on different aspects of L.Cardamom produced in NepalOrganize interaction and sharing workshops at local and national level on the project resultsPreparation of the full project proposal capitalizing on the lesson learnt and best practices validated and submission to the Government

snapshot.executing_agency: Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Development

en.full: Promoting large cardamom value chain in Nepal under One Country One Priority Product (OCOP) framework

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
